case_title: XU RICHARD VS DUONG TAI MR.

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY XU RICHARD AS TO DEFENDANT DUONG TAI MR. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR DEC-05-1994 AT 07:00 PM IN DEPT 00
TRIAL RESET TO DEC-19-1994 AT 07:00 PM IN DEPT 01 TRIAL OF DEC-05-1994 IS TAKEN OFF CALENDAR
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT DUONG TAI MR.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF XU RICHARD RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT DUONG TAI MR. $5,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $15.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,015.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS

CASE_TRANSFERRED TO SUPERIOR COURT, APPELLATE NUMBER 23768, RECORD TRANSFERRED

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING AMENDED JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF XU RICHARD IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT DUONG TAI MR. JUDGM. WITHOUT PREJUDICE TO ANY CLAIMS PLTF HAS AGAINST THE COMPANIES IN ISSUE. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
